description: Create a custom Talon action and voice command to automate logging data across applications. In C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\evidence_logger\evidence_macro.py, define an action user.log_evidence(item_id: str) that copies the current selection, switches focus to the Notepad application, inserts the prefix "Item " followed by the item ID and " - ", pastes the clipboard contents, presses enter, and returns focus to the original application. In the same directory, create evidence.talon with the voice command log evidence <user.text>: that invokes the action using the captured text. Ensure the implementation includes appropriate delays for window switching and input.
